calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 24,2020 is admitted to probate. Leland Chew is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.
